name: CARE Pretty Print
description: CARE plugin for ID card printing with browser support, currently limited to landscape CR80 (85 × 54 mm) cards with a fixed, non-customizable layout.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_pretty_print_fe for development and manual testing.

appBaseUrl.label: App base URL
appBaseUrl.description: Base URL where the frontend plug is served.

optional.label: Identifier ID
optional.description: UUID of the patient identifier to be printed.

custom.label: Custom environments
custom.description: Add extra environment variables for advanced setup.
